modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to enable a new app in G-Suite.

full_description_text:  
The user wants to enable a new app in G-Suite. They are not sure how to do this. The request is for the app to be added to their USD G-Suite account. They need help with this process.
short_description: Request to enable a new app in G-Suite.
description: The user wants to enable a new app in G-Suite. They are not sure how to do this. The request is for the app to be added to their USD G-Suite account. They need help with this process.
